title: ImplementationResult
description: JSON result returned by Codex after completing or failing an implementation task. All properties are required; optional fields use nullable types so the model can return null when not applicable.

task_id.description: Must match the task_id of the ImplementationTask.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of what was done or why it failed.

files_changed.description: List of file paths that were modified, added, or deleted. Null or empty for read-only tasks.

validation_results.description: Results of validation commands run by Codex. Null if no validation commands were specified.

issues.description: List of problems, blockers, or uncertainties encountered. Null or empty if none.

proposed_followup_tasks.description: Follow-up tasks Codex proposes. Null or empty if none. Codex must NOT write them to tasks.json directly.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when Codex finished. Null if not recorded.
